# abfss://<container>@<storage-account>.dfs.core.windows.net/<folder>/<file>
# https://saashpract.blob.core.windows.net/health-care-project/bronze/Billing.parquet

# df = spark.read.parquet("abfss://health-care-project@saashpract.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/Billing.parquet")

# df.show(5)


Incremental Bronze → Silver (Watermark)
last_watermark = spark.sql("select max(updated_at) from watermark_table").collect()[0][0]

df = spark.read.format("delta").load("/mnt/bronze/patient") \
    .filter(f"updated_at > '{last_watermark}'")

## Incremental load
to push data from bronze to silver only todays data

Incremental Bronze → Silver (Watermark)
last_watermark = spark.sql("select max(updated_at) from watermark_table").collect()[0][0]

df = spark.read.format("delta").load("/mnt/bronze/patient") \
    .filter(f"updated_at > '{last_watermark}'")

#Reading file from bronse and using schema to verify
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.types import *

loc="abfss://health-care-project@saashpract.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/"

df_Dep=spark.read.format("parquet").load(f"{loc}Departments.parquet")
df_Doc=spark.read.format("parquet").load(f"{loc}Doctors.parquet")
df_visit=spark.read.format("parquet").load(f"{loc}visit.parquet")
df_diag=spark.read.format("parquet").load(f"{loc}diagnosis.parquet")
df_bill=spark.read.format("parquet").load(f"{loc}Billing.parquet")
df_pat=spark.read.format("parquet").load(f"{loc}patient.parquet")

# df_Dep.printSchema()
# df_Doc.printSchema()
# df_visit.printSchema()
# df_diag.printSchema()
# df_bill.printSchema()
# df_pat.printSchema()

df_Dep=df_Dep.withColumn("floor_number",col("floor_number").cast("int"))\
             .withColumn("contact_number",col("contact_number").cast("int"))\
             .withColumn("opening_time",to_date(col("opening_time"),"dd-MM-yyyy"))\
             .withColumn("closing_time",to_date(col("closing_time"),"dd-MM-yyyy"))
df_Doc=df_Doc.withColumn("experience_years",col("experience_years").cast("int"))\
             .withColumn("joining_date",to_date(col("joining_date"),"dd-MM-yyyy"))


# df_Dep.printSchema()
# df_Doc.printSchema()
# df_visit.printSchema()
# df_diag.printSchema()
# df_bill.printSchema()
# df_pat.printSchema()

#------------------------------------------------------Removing duplicates & Null------------------------------------
df_cl_dep=df_Dep.dropDuplicates(["department_id"]).dropna(subset=["department_id","department_name"])\
                .withColumn("department_name",trim(col("department_name")))\
			    .withColumn("active_flag",upper(trim(col("active_flag"))))

df_cl_doc=df_Doc.dropDuplicates(['doctor_id']).dropna(subset=['doctor_id','doctor_name'])\
                .withColumn("doctor_name",trim(col("doctor_name")))\
                .withColumn("active_flag",upper(trim(col("active_flag"))))

df_cl_visit=df_visit.dropDuplicates(['hadm_id']).dropna(subset=['hadm_id','subject_id','admittime']).withColumnRenamed("hadm_id","visit_id")
df_cl_dia=df_diag.dropDuplicates().dropna(subset=["hadm_id","icd_code",])
df_cl_bill=df_bill.select("age",when(col("sex") == "female", "F").when(col("sex") == "male", "M").otherwise("U").alias("sex")
                          ,"bmi","children","smoker","region","charges",
                         (col("charges") * 0.7).alias("insurance_amount"),
                         (col("charges") * 0.3).alias("self_pay_amount"))\
        .dropDuplicates().withColumnRenamed("charges","total_amount")
df_cl_pat=df_pat.dropDuplicates().dropna(subset=['subject_id',"gender"]).withColumnRenamed("subject_id","patient_id")\
                .withColumn("gender", upper(trim(col("gender"))))


# display(df_cl_pat.limit(2))
# display(df_cl_dep.limit(2))
# display(df_cl_doc.limit(2))
# display(df_cl_visit.limit(2))
# display(df_cl_dia.limit(2))
# display(df_cl_bill.limit(2))

# Join admissions with patients\n",
df_visits = df_cl_visit.join(df_cl_pat,df_cl_visit["subject_id"] == df_cl_pat["patient_id"],"left")

#Get primary diagnosis per visit (seq_num = 1 is primary)",
df_diagnosis = df_cl_dia.filter(col("seq_num") == 1).select("hadm_id","icd_code","icd_version")\
                         .withColumnRenamed("hadm_id","hadm_id_diag")\
                         .withColumnRenamed("icd_code","primary_icd_code")

#Join visits with primary diagnosis\n",
df_visits = df_visits.join(df_diagnosis,df_visits["visit_id"] == df_diagnosis["hadm_id_diag"],"left")


#dim_date
